DESCRIPTION This stone grants you immunity to poison, as if wearing a periapt of proof against poison. Cracked: This stone grants immunity to one kind of poison, such as arsenic or scorpion venom. Price: 1,500 gp. Flawed: This stone grants immunity to poison and a â4 penalty on saving throws against curses and diseases. Price: 40,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, neutralize poison; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 27,000 gp
